info.title: Odds API v5
info.description: High-performance odds API backed by Valkey + Supabase RPC discovery.

get.description:
List bookmakers.

Returns the bookmaker catalog available to the provided apiKey.

Lookup mode: `bookmakers` (optional filter list) + `playerProps` (optional capability filter).

parameters.name: bookmakers
parameters.description: Comma- or space-separated bookmaker slugs. Supports `*` / `all` for wildcard.

parameters.name: playerProps
parameters.description: If true, only return bookmakers that support player proposition markets.

get.description:
List sports.

Lookup mode: `sportIds` (optional filter list).

List tournaments.

Lookup mode: `sportId` OR `tournamentIds`.

Default: if neither is provided, the API uses `sportId=11`.

List seasons.

Lookup mode: `seasonIds` OR `tournamentId`.

List participants.

Lookup mode: `participantIds` OR `sportId` OR `playerId`.

List players.

Lookup mode: `playerIds` OR `participantId` OR `sportId`.

List venues by explicit IDs.

Name fields are returned in the requested language when available.

List markets.

Lookup mode: `marketIds` OR `sportId` OR `outcomeIds`.

List currencies and conversion values.

Lookup mode: `currency` (optional filter).

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: Currency code (case-insensitive), e.g. EUR, usd, BTC.

get.description:
List fixtures.

Lookup mode: `fixtureIds` OR filters (`sportId`, `tournamentId`, `statusId`, optional time range).

If `bookmakers` is present, bookmaker meta is included and results may be filtered by mapping availability.

parameters.name: bookmakers
parameters.description: Comma/space-separated bookmaker slugs. If present (even empty), includes bookmaker META and filters by mapping.

get.description:
List today's fixtures.

Lookup mode: optional filters (`bookmakers`, `sportId`, `tournamentId`).

List live fixtures.

Lookup mode: optional filters (`bookmakers`, `sportId`, `tournamentId`).

Get current odds for a fixture.

Lookup mode: required `fixtureId` + optional `bookmakers`, optional filtering flags.

If `since` is provided, returns odds updates with `changedAt >= since`.

parameters.name: marketActive
parameters.description: If set, filter by marketActive flag.

parameters.name: mainLine
parameters.description: If set, filter by mainLine flag.

200.description: Returns FixtureOddsResponse (fixture meta + odds + bookmaker meta)

get.description:
Get opening vs closing line values (OLV/CLV) for a fixture.

Lookup mode: required `fixtureId` + optional `bookmakers` OR optional `oddsIds`.

parameters.name: oddsIds
parameters.description: Optional: comma/space-separated oddsIds to restrict the response.

get.description:
Get historical odds timeline for a fixture.

Lookup mode: required `fixtureId` + (`bookmaker` required when `oddsIds` is not provided) OR `oddsIds`.

parameters.name: bookmaker
parameters.description: Single bookmaker slug. RULE: If oddsIds is NOT provided, you must pass exactly ONE bookmaker.

parameters.name: oddsIds
parameters.description: Optional: comma/space-separated oddsIds to restrict the response.

get.description:
Get current main odds for multiple fixtures.

Lookup mode: provide exactly one of:
- `tournamentId` (recommended)
- `fixtureIds` (fast path)

If `since` is provided, returns odds updates with `changedAt >= since`.

parameters.name: tournamentId
parameters.description: Single tournamentId. Required if `fixtureIds` is not provided.

parameters.name: fixtureIds
parameters.description: Comma/space-separated fixtureIds (fast path). Required if `tournamentId` is not provided.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: changedAt >= since (ms). If provided, returns also inactive odds.

200.description: Returns an array of fixtures (fixture meta + odds + bookmaker meta).

example.summary: Odds by tournament (fixtures list with odds)

get.description:
List fixture mappings for external bookmakers.

Lookup mode: `bookmaker` (optional) + `fixtureIds` OR `bookmakerFixtureIds`.

Get settlements for a fixture.

Lookup mode: required `fixtureId` + optional `outcomeId`, optional `playerId`.

parameters.name: outcomeId
parameters.description: Optional: restrict settlements to a single outcomeId.

parameters.name: playerId
parameters.description: Optional: restrict settlements to a single playerId.

get.description:
List futures.

Lookup mode: `futureIds` OR `sportId` OR `tournamentId` (at least one).

parameters.name: bookmakers
parameters.description: If provided, includes bookmakers meta per future.

get.description:
List live futures.

Lookup mode: optional `sportId` / `tournamentId` filters.

Get latest odds for a future.

Lookup mode: required `futureId` + optional filters (`bookmakers`, `since`, `mainLines`, `includeFuture`).

parameters.name: includeFuture
parameters.description: If true, includes futureMeta in the response.

get.description:
Get OLV and CLV for a future’s odds.

Lookup mode: required `futureId` + optional `bookmakers` OR optional `oddsIds`.

parameters.name: oddsIds
parameters.description: Optional: comma/space-separated oddsIds to restrict the response.

get.description:
Get historical odds changes for a future.

Lookup mode: required `futureId` + (`bookmakers` required when `oddsIds` is not provided) OR `oddsIds`.

parameters.name: bookmakers
parameters.description: Comma/space-separated bookmaker slugs. RULE: If oddsIds is NOT provided, you must pass exactly ONE bookmaker.

parameters.name: oddsIds
parameters.description: Optional: comma/space-separated oddsIds to restrict the response.

get.description:
Map internal future IDs to bookmaker/provider future IDs.

Lookup mode: required `bookmaker` + (`futureIds` OR `bookmakerFutureIds`).

Get settlements for a future.

Currently not available.

Get bookmaker logo.

Returns an HTTP redirect to the image asset.

Response: 302 with `Location` header (final resource typically WebP).

200.description: Final image response (when redirect is followed and/or proxy mode is used).

get.description:
Get category icon.

Returns an HTTP redirect to the image asset.

Response: 302 with `Location` header (final resource typically SVG).

200.description: Final image response (when redirect is followed and/or proxy mode is used).

get.description:
Get tournament image.

Returns an HTTP redirect to the image asset.

Response: 302 with `Location` header (final resource typically PNG).

200.description: Final image response (when redirect is followed and/or proxy mode is used).

get.description:
Get participant image.

Returns an HTTP redirect to the image asset.

Response: 302 with `Location` header (final resource typically PNG).

200.description: Final image response (when redirect is followed and/or proxy mode is used).

ApiKeyAuth.name: apiKey
ApiKeyAuth.description: Your API key (query-based auth for v5).

MediaRedirect.description: Redirect to an asset URL. Follow the Location header.

Location.description: Absolute URL to the image asset

categoryPath.name: category
categoryPath.description: Category identifier (slug/code), e.g. de, usa, fr.

Error.description: Concrete error format returned by this API (no FastAPI detail wrapper).

details.description: Optional extra details (string/object/array depending on the error).

participants.description: List of participants (teams/players) competing in this futures market.

FutureOddsRow.description: A single futures odds entry. The key for futures odds is futureId:bookmaker:participantId.
